releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
In this brief patch, I'm actioning on some of the changes requested by the Obsidian team.

In terms of usability, the only change is that the "Lavadocs: Push" option will not be available in the command prompt if there is no active document.

## PR involved
* Address plugin submission feedback by @SaalikLok in https://github.com/SaalikLok/lavadocs-obsidian/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SaalikLok/lavadocs-obsidian/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Welcome To Lavadocs 🌋 

This is the first release of the Lavadocs Obsidian plugin. Once installed, the plugin pushes documents from Obsidian to Lavadocs, so that they can be shared.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SaalikLok/lavadocs-obsidian/commits/1.0.0
